settings.heading_r:
2x4 FORTIFIED WOOD
CONSTRUCTION
MADE FOR GYMS - EXTRA
STRONG, HEAVY USERS
settings.text_title_r: For the heavy duty gym users, we want our clients to enjoy the medical benefits of our saunas all year round. so we made our doors thicker and stronger for durability.

In commercial saunas the floor is the first thing to be damaged.Thats why instead of having wood every 10 inches, we reinforce the floors and have heavy duty wood every 1 inch. This means we use 10 times more wood but it is worth it to avoid any issues.

settings.heading_r: BACKED BY 48 DOCTORS,CHIROPRACTORS, PHYSICAL THERAPISTS, SURGEONS
settings.text_title_r: Enjoy free branding with 48 doctors - use their endorsements on our site to promote your sauna.
Unlike the standard 77-inch tall saunas offered by our competitors, our commercial models distinguish themselves with a height of 86 inches. They comfortably accommodate individuals up to 6'8".

settings.heading_r: EXTRA LONG ERGONOMIC 31-INCH TALL BUILT-IN BACKREST
settings.text_title_r: Going beyond the usual 12-inch sauna backrests, we decided a spacious 31-inch, Others may charge $500 for this feature, but we believe in providing a high level of comfort as a standard in our saunas.

settings.heading_r: 31-INCH CHROME EASY CLEAN HANDLE W/WASHABLE COVER
settings.text_title_r: Cleaning saunas can be challenging, but not with ours. Our commercial-grade handles are designed for easy maintenance and, measuring at 31 inches, they outsize the typical 12-inch handles found in many sauna.

At Medical Saunas, we've tackled this challenge head-on by designing our saunas from the ground up, incorporating Natural Red Cedar known for its medicinal and structural attributes. This wood also matures and strengthens over time, ensuring our saunas become even more durable as they age.
A sauna is about relaxation and rejuvenation, not frustration. We upgraded our sauna construction with clasp together technology so you can have the most seamless of sauna assembly.
Tempered glass emerges as the prime choice when prioritizing strength, thermal resilience, and safety as important factors.
Experience the difference with our heat-resistant speaker systems designed to transform every session into an oasis of meditative music.

settings.heading: INCLUDED IN PRICE (+ all features of Commercial 485™ Features 1-10)
Medical Sauna
settings.headblue: Why get a regular sauna when you can get a Medical Sauna™

settings.yt_content: Dr. Berg talks about saunas and using dry heat to improve your health.
Dr. Oz and Oprah in a Sauna
Dr. Mercola and Steve Benda Discuss Saunas
The Health Benefits of Far Infrared Saunas for Cancer

settings.yt_video_content_top: Sauna usage has become increasingly popular over the last several years, as evidenced by Google trends. Respected cardiologist Dr. Jari Laukkanen, alongside experts such as Dr. Rhonda Patrick, PhD, and renowned nutritionist Thomas DeLauer, have emphasized the many potential health advantages of sauna therapy. These benefits are bolstered by companies like Medical Sauna™, which worked with over 48 doctors to construct a medical-grade facility for customers. Regular sessions in these medical saunas can help reduce risks of cardiovascular diseases, stroke, dementia, and even Alzheimer's, as well as boost blood circulation, aid muscle recovery, and provide pain relief. Adding a commercial Medical Spa to your business not only supports your community in establishing a healthy daily sauna routine but also promotes a lifestyle that offers comprehensive care for one's mental, physical, and emotional well-being.

settings.colcontent: Switching to Commercial 485 Spa has elevated our salon's standard a lot and I can see an increase in the amount of people coming in on the weekends. I was at one point worried about my business but after this purchase I am now planning for the next 5 years.

settings.heading: CUSTOMER
settings.textcontent: To help you decide for yourself how effective Medical Saunas are, we have listed REAL, UNCENSORED, UNEDITED reviews, emails and comments from customers who have paid for and used Medical Saunas™.
